metadata.description: Curated Pack catalog for EditVolt. Installs from upstream Git URLs; thin wrappers stay in this repo.

plugins.name: adobe-app-builder
plugins.description: Development, customization, testing, and deployment skills for Adobe App Builder projects.

plugins.name: adobe-stardust
plugins.description: Guided website redesign skills — higher-level design flow for existing sites.

plugins.name: adobe-web
plugins.description: Browser automation and web page analysis skills (playwright-cli, CDP, DOM extraction).

plugins.name: adobe-aem-eds
plugins.description: Skills for AEM Edge Delivery Services development.

plugins.name: adobe-aem-cloud-service
plugins.description: AEM as a Cloud Service skills — components, Dispatcher, and workflows.

plugins.name: adobe-aem-6-5-lts
plugins.description: AEM 6.5 LTS skills — Dispatcher and workflows for AEM 6.5 LTS and AMS.

plugins.name: adobe-aem-project-management
plugins.description: Project lifecycle management skills for AEM Edge Delivery Services.

plugins.name: adobe-aem-eds-content-ops
plugins.description: EDS content operations — SEO, accessibility, metadata, sitemaps, and content auditing.

plugins.name: adobe-analytics
plugins.description: Adobe Analytics practitioner skills via the Analytics MCP server — KPIs, funnels, segments.

auth.reason: Needs Adobe Analytics MCP credentials before reporting tools work.

plugins.name: adobe-cja
plugins.description: Adobe Customer Journey Analytics skills via the CJA MCP server.

auth.reason: Needs Adobe Customer Journey Analytics MCP credentials before tools work.

plugins.name: adobe-commerce-app-management
plugins.description: Adobe Commerce app management skills for store and extension workflows.

plugins.name: adobe-commerce-app-migration
plugins.description: Adobe Commerce app migration skills for moving and modernizing store apps.

plugins.name: adobe-for-creativity
plugins.description: Creative Cloud agent skills — image edit workflows and creative automation.

plugins.name: huggingface-skills
plugins.description: Hugging Face Hub operations via the hf CLI — models, datasets, jobs, and skill bootstrap.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core agent skills library: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques.

plugins.name: compound-engineering
plugins.description: Brainstorm, plan, debug, review, and compound learnings with AI agents.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Up-to-date library documentation lookup for LLMs and coding agents.

plugins.name: github-mcp
plugins.description: Official GitHub MCP server — repositories, issues, pull requests, and more.

auth.reason: Needs a GitHub personal access token for repository tools.

plugins.name: notion-mcp
plugins.description: Official Notion MCP server — pages, databases, and workspace search.

auth.reason: Needs a Notion integration token before tools work.

plugins.name: datadog-mcp
plugins.description: Datadog remote MCP — metrics, logs, monitors, and observability tools.

auth.reason: Authenticate with your Datadog account when the MCP session starts.

plugins.name: google-gcloud
plugins.description: Google Cloud gcloud MCP — manage GCP resources from the agent.

auth.reason: Requires local gcloud authentication for GCP tools.

plugins.name: cloudflare-mcp
plugins.description: Cloudflare MCP server — Workers, DNS, and account operations.

auth.reason: Needs a Cloudflare API token for account tools.
